ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price to account for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the session belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., regular, pre-market, post-market) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the condition belongs to */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Current market status (e.g., open, closed, pre-market, post-market) */,
  "trading_halt" INTEGER /* Indicates whether trading is halted */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market condition */,
  "halt_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any trading halt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_conditions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the feed belongs to */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the data feed (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data feed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchange_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "primary_exchange" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exchange is the primary listing for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_exchange_map_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_exchange_map_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
